mapper.select: SELECT `b`.`id` AS `id`, `b`.`isbn` AS `isbn`, `b`.`title` AS `title`, `b`.`author` AS `author`, `b`.`publisher` AS `publisher`, DATE_FORMAT(`b`.`publish_date`, '%Y.%m.%d') AS `publishDate`, `b`.`cover_image` AS `coverImage`, `b`.`total_quantity` AS `totalQuantity`, `b`.`status` AS `status`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT `c`.`name` ORDER BY `c`.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `categoryName` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` `b` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` AS `bc` ON `b`.`id` = `bc`.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` AS `c` ON `bc`.`category_id` = `c`.`id` WHERE `b`.`id` = #{id} GROUP BY `b`.`id`
